zh.lifeSummary: Faith or Alice Fleming於1302年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。她於1323年與Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年在她的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Faith or Alice Fleming于1302年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。她于1323年与Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年在她的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Faith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun denoting the quality of believing and trusting in God. The name began to be used in the 16th century, was very popular among the Puritans of the 17th, and is presently enjoying a modest comeback.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Faith or Alice Fleming was born in 1302, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock in 1323, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1345, in her hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Faith or Alice Fleming est née en 1302, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock en 1323, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1345, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1323 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Faith or Alice Flemingは1302年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた。1323年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでSir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Faith or Alice Fleming(은)는 1302년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Faith or Alice Fleming родилась в 1302 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock в 1323 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1345 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
